Tests and build scripts for system applications and the Kickstart app.

## Folders
- **[system_apps](system_apps/README.md)**: Tests and build scripts for health, launcher, timeline, weather, and workout system applications.
- **[watch](watch/README.md)**: Tests for the Kickstart app's rendering and data handling, and build script for source files and tests.
